creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text: Today, I just ran into the same problem again, this time with different keys. As of today with port mail/claws-mail-pgp at claws-mail-pgp-3.17.3, when a recipient occurs multiple times in a keyring of port security/gnupg, gnupg-2.2.12, with revoked keys of the recipient present, the plugin is incapable of selecting and presenting the still active and valid key. In my case, the revoked keys occur prior to the still active key of the recipient.
